validation_rules: If totals exist: total ~= subtotal + tax
If line items exist: total ~= sum(line_items.amount)
instructions:
Extraction Instructions:

File Name:
- Use the source file name.

hauler_name:
- Anchor on company name header, e.g. lines containing "FRONTIER WASTE". Take full text in uppercase prior to the remittance address block.

invoice_number:
- Anchor on "INVOICE #", "Invoice #", "Invoice No", or "Invoice Number". Extract the numeric value immediately following.

amount:
- Anchor on labels: "AMOUNT", "INVOICE TOTAL", or "Total Due" (choose the first such line at the top of the document, not in line items/tables).
- Extract the numeric value; normalization: remove currency symbols and commas.

account_number:
- Anchor on "ACCOUNT #", "Account No", or "Account Number". Extract the numeric value following label.

bill_date:
- Anchor on top-of-document "DATE" or "Bill Date" labels.
- Prefer "DATE" found near invoice/account details (not table headers).
- Extract value and normalize as YYYY-MM-DD.

due_date:
- Anchor on "Due Date", "DUE UPON RECEIPT", or similar.
- If "Due Upon Receipt" appears, set to null/NaN.
- Else, extract and normalize as YYYY-MM-DD.

bill_address:
- Extract address block beneath the hauler name, ending before customer (account_name) info. Include PO boxes and city/state/ZIP.

account_name:
- Anchor on unique customer/company name below main "AMOUNT"/"ACCOUNT #" area (e.g. "ROADRUNNER RECYCLING").
- Use full line; ignore address content.

site_address:
- In the first site block, anchor on lines like "Site [site_id] - [name] - [address]". Extract the address segment immediately after site name and dash.

site_id:
- In the first site block, extract the number after "Site" and before dash (e.g. in "Site 209284001 - TEXAS EXCEL - ...").

line_date:
- In the first line-item table of the first site, extract under "DATE" column (match MM/DD/YY - MM/DD/YY or MM/DD/YY formats).

line_description:
- In first site, from table, extract under "DESCRIPTION" column for first line with a value.

wo_number:
- In "WO #" column for first row. If blank/missing, output null/NaN.

po_number:
- In "PO #" column for first row. If blank/missing, output null/NaN.

quantity:
- Extract numeric value under "QTY" column of the first row.

unit_rate:
- Extract numeric value under "UNIT RATE" column of the first row; normalization: remove commas and currency symbols.

line_total:
- Extract numeric value under "TOTAL" column of the first row; normalization: remove commas and currency symbols.

Normalization:
- For all numbers: remove commas, currency symbols.
- For dates: output all normalized as YYYY-MM-DD when possible. If date range, retain original format (e.g., "MM/DD/YY - MM/DD/YY").
- If value missing/blank, output null/NaN.

Table/Line items:
- Detect table by header: "DATE", "DESCRIPTION", "WO #", "PO #", "QTY", "UNIT RATE", "TOTAL".
- Map columns by header label; first complete data row is reference for extraction.
